if (provider == null) {

if (ids == null != (ids.size() == 0)) {

But when ids is null, evaluating ids.size() will throw a NullPointerException.

Now, regarding fault adjacent: Fault adjacent mutants are those that introduce changes near the location of a known bug or issue. In this case, the mutant is in DateTimeZone.java, lines 159-160, which were changed from a proper null and empty check to an incorrect one that can cause NPE.
